commit_scope: Validate and harden orchestrator A/B routing across providers/models/prompts with deterministic challenger forcing, sticky retry-policy protection, regression quarantine fallback, and coverage telemetry.
evidence_refs: cd api && ruff check app/services/agent_service.py tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py
cd api && ruff check app/services/orchestrator_policy_service.py app/models/coherence.py tests/test_orchestrator_policy_service.py
cd api && python3 - <<'PY' (service-level A/B cohort + regression quarantine simulation)

commands: cd api && ruff check app/services/agent_service.py app/services/orchestrator_policy_service.py app/models/coherence.py tests/test_agent_executor_policy.py tests/test_orchestrator_policy_service.py

phase_gate.blocked_reason: Awaiting commit/push and remote deploy verification

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Orchestrator A/B selection should spread challenger usage when control is overused, preserve sticky retry executor policy, and roll back to control when challenger regression quarantine is active.
test_flows: Create impl tasks and verify context.orchestrator_model_selection.ab_test includes cohort, selected model, and target challenger percent.
Drive forced challenger failures and verify subsequent bucketed task falls back to control with challenger_quarantined fallback_reason.
Check orchestration guidance awareness contains active_ab_regression_quarantines entries.
